subparts.text: Define Advertising and is purpose in Marketing
Explain any two advertising budget methods
What do you understand by Reach and Frequency and how they are calculated?
What do you understand by ROAS and ACOS
Explain the essentials of good advertisement Copy.
Explain brand loyalty and its significance in brand management

questions.question_text: Elyssence Skincare, a mid-sized beauty and wellness brand, recently launched its new organic skincare line. To promote its products effectively, the company initiated a comprehensive advertising campaign. The marketing team set clear advertising objectives based on the AIDA Model. Using the FreshBloom Skincare case study, explain how the AIDA Model is applied to set advertising objectives.
What do you understand by Legal aspect of Advertising. Explain the legal principles in advertising with suitable examples.
What do you understand by Media Planning? Explain the process of Media Planning and discuss the challenges encountered during Media Planning.
What is media scheduling, and what are its objectives? Explain the different strategies of media scheduling.
How would you define advertising appeal, and what are the different types of advertisement appeals to influence consumer behavior and decision-making?
How would you define advertisement effectiveness in the context of marketing communications, and what different methods can be employed to evaluate the effectiveness of an advertising campaign?

XYZ Snacks, a newly launched brand in the competitive snacks market, aims to position itself as the preferred choice for health-conscious consumers. To achieve this, the brand plans to use the slogan “Taste Meets Health” and emphasize its key features, including organic ingredients, low-calorie options, and eco-friendly packaging. Furthermore, the company intends to rebrand the product name to better reflect these attributes and strengthen its market appeal. In this context, analyze the brand positioning strategy adopted by XYZ Snacks, explaining the concept of brand positioning, the various strategies available for effective brand positioning, and how the success of a brand positioning strategy can be evaluated.
Define brand equity and explain the Aaker Model of Brand Equity with suitable examples.
